Yellow bumpy sponges

Kingdom Animalia

Updated Oct 2016

Where seen?

There are various yellow or orange sponges which look like cones, lumpy fingers or bumps. They have yet to be identified. They are grouped together here for ease of display.

Tuas, Apr 05
Beting Bronok, Jun 03
Chek Jawa, Jan 02
Beting Bronok, Jun 10
Pulau Sekudu, Apr 06

**Species are difficult to positively identify without close examination.

On this website, they are grouped by external features for convenience of display.*

Yellow bumpy sponges on Singapore shores

On wildsingapore flickr

  • Photos for free download
  • Map of sightings in Singapore
